comment: STAGED -- NOT YET BOOTABLE. DS25 is a Titan (21274) machine (dual EV68). Same caveat as es45_platform.json: EmulatR's TitanChipset is a scaffold and Machine.cpp has no Titan selection seam yet, so model=DS25 will not produce a faithful DS25 until the Titan path is completed (journals/20260616_titan_21274_interface.md). Kept ready. Real DS25 = Titan, ALi M1543C south bridge, dual EV68. PCI topology _PROVISIONAL. Strict JSON: no // or /* */ comments -- use comment fields.

pci_devices.name: isa_bridge
pci_devices.comment: STAND-IN (real DS25 south bridge = ALi M1543C). Placeholder until the ALi model + Titan path land.
